# My Awesome Gem

This is my awesome gem that does cool things.

## Installation

Add this to your Gemfile:

```ruby
gem "my-awesome-gem"
```

## Usage

```ruby
require "my_awesome_gem"
MyAwesomeGem.do_something
```

### The `*-merge` Gem Family

The `*-merge` gem family provides intelligent, AST-based merging for various file formats.

| Gem | Format | Description |
|-----|--------|-------------|
| [tree_haver][tree_haver] | Multi | Foundation: Cross-Ruby adapter |
| [ast-merge][ast-merge] | Text | Infrastructure: Shared base classes |
| [prism-merge][prism-merge] | Ruby | Smart merge for Ruby source files |

[tree_haver]: https://github.com/kettle-rb/tree_haver
[ast-merge]: https://github.com/kettle-rb/ast-merge
[prism-merge]: https://github.com/kettle-rb/prism-merge
